note: Model roster for the animgen tool. Replicate IDs + field mappings verified by TRACK_B's live schema fetch (2026-06-10); cost_per_second_usd from the billing-verified cost rule. Replicate per-parameter schemas are fetched live at edit time, so only canonical metadata lives here. Local (comfyui) entries point at a workflow template under ../workflows.
default_negative_prompt: camera pan, camera zoom, dolly, tracking shot, scene change, background change, new background, realistic, photorealistic, 3D render, blurry, extra limbs, deformed hands, text, watermark, frozen, still image, static pose

models.notes: Hero/production tier. Always pass an explicit aspect_ratio (the editor injects the chosen aspect); omitting it defaults to 16:9 and stretches/clips a tighter-framed keypose. Camera is stochastic (seed lottery). Two-part prompts soak duration padding. A tier/resolution change is a choreography REROLL, not an upgrade. Cost: $/s of output, non_video_in (image-input) variant, scraped from the Replicate pricing JSON 2026-06: 480p=0.08, 720p=0.18, 1080p=0.45. Resolution 480p/720p/1080p and the full aspect set (1:1/16:9/9:16/4:3/3:4/21:9/9:21) match Replicate's live schema; 'adaptive' is omitted (no fixed canvas).

Cheap choreography auditions only. Validates prompt/staging; never the final frame source (tier change = reroll). Fast-tier bg shimmer is keyed out. Resolution 480p/720p and the full aspect set (1:1/16:9/9:16/4:3/3:4/21:9/9:21) match Replicate's live schema; 'adaptive' is omitted (no fixed canvas). Cost: $/s of output, non_video_in (image-input) variant, scraped from the Replicate pricing JSON 2026-06: 480p=0.07, 720p=0.15.

Prior-gen ByteDance Seedance, image-to-video. Start frame -> 'image', end frame -> 'last_frame_image' (both already in replicate_client.ALIASES). Unlike seedance-2.0 there is NO required aspect lock: aspect_ratio is IGNORED when an image is supplied (per live schema), and AnimGen always sends a start keyframe, so the output follows the framing canvas - aspect_ratio is deliberately left out of default_params. camera_fixed=true stabilises the camera for sprite work. fps fixed at 24. Cost: token-billed (tokens = h*w*fps*duration/1024 at $2.5/1M tokens for pro); the per-second table is the 16:9 equivalent {480p~0.024, 720p~0.054, 1080p~0.122} - true cost scales with the chosen aspect's pixel count. Replicate IDs/fields verified via live schema fetch 2026-06-16.

Cheaper prior-gen Seedance, image-to-video (the Lite sibling of seedance-1.0-pro). Same field mapping (start='image', end='last_frame_image') and same aspect-ignored-when-image behaviour, so no required aspect lock. Also exposes reference_images (1-4) which AnimGen doesn't use. fps fixed at 24; duration floor is 4s (vs 2s on pro). Cost: token-billed at $1.8/1M tokens; per-second 16:9 equivalent {480p~0.017, 720p~0.039, 1080p~0.087} - scales with aspect pixel count. Replicate IDs/fields verified via live schema fetch 2026-06-16.

Best lane: single short airborne/structural actions. Files API unsupported -> data-uri REQUIRED (images < ~250KB: flatten bg to magenta, then quantize). Short durations fix bg pulsing. Never pack multiple moves (its lever is duration). Resolution 540p/720p/1080p and aspects (16:9/9:16/3:4/4:3/1:1) match Replicate's live schema. Cost: $/s by resolution (Replicate model page 2026-06): 540p=0.07, 720p=0.15, 1080p=0.16 (default 720p kept).

Strong prompt adherence, fast. Resolution defaults 1080p - set 720p. Duration is an enum (4/6/8s). No 1:1 aspect on Replicate; test aspect 'auto'. Cost: priced by AUDIO, not resolution (Replicate 2026-06) - without-audio=0.10/s (our case, audio forced off), with-audio=0.15/s; 720p and 1080p cost the same.

Cheap filler / prototyping (quality ~animation-student). Resolution defaults 1080p - set 720p. Two-part prompts help padding. 'audio' is a URL string, not a boolean toggle. Cost: $/s by resolution (Replicate 2026-06): 720p=0.10, 1080p=0.15.

Stable backgrounds but low-fps cadence and invents actions (retired by human verdict). mode default=pro; set 'standard' for cheaper. Kept available for one-off comparisons. Replicate's API default is pro; we default to standard (cheapest). mode standard/pro/4k matches Replicate's live schema; Kling exposes NO resolution param (mode is the only quality axis). Cost: $/s by MODE, without-audio (Replicate 2026-06): standard=0.168, pro=0.224, 4k=0.42.

Local Wan 2.2 14B. The app picks the workflow from the shot's keyframes: end keyframe set -> FLF first-last tween; no end -> open-ended (I2V-style) continuation from the start frame (prepare_workflow severs the end-image node). ~3 min/render. ComfyUI must run on 127.0.0.1:8188. Best for transitions: stand<->crouch, hurt snap/recovery, block flinch. Template node ids match the FLF_*.json family. (VACE multi-pin deferred until 3-4 pin keyframes exist; build per-job via scripts/make_vace_workflow.py.)
